basic_details.job_title: DCHS Bapatla Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 26 Lab Attendant, Theatre Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Coordinator of Hospital Services Bapatla (DCHS Bapatla)
basic_details.short_information: District Coordinator of Hospital Services Bapatla (DCHS Bapatla) Paramedical and Supporting Staff Notification 2026 has been released on 25 June 2026 on the official website of DCHS Bapatla. A total of 26 vacancies have been announced through the DCHS Bapatla Paramedical and Supporting Staff Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/BC/EWS: 5 years; Ex-service Men: 3 years in addition to length of service; Differently abled: 10 years

qualification.education_qualification: SSC/10th or equivalent, Lab Attendant Course or Intermediate (Lab Attendant Vocational Course) for Lab Attendant
qualification.details: Theatre Assistant: Must have passed SSC/10th or its equivalent. Lab Attendant: Must have passed SSC/10th or its equivalent. Must Possess Lab Attendant Course or Intermediate (Lab Attendant Vocational Course) conducted by the Board of Inter Education, AP or from any other institution recognized by the Govt of A.P. General Duty Attendants GDA / MNO /FNO: Must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board. Post Mortem Assistant: Must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board. Office Sub-ordinate: Must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board.

selection_process: 75% marks in qualifying examination Weightage up to 10 marks for experience Weightage up to 15% for contract/outsourcing service Counselling
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://bapatla.ap.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 01-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download DCHS Bapatla Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download DCHS Bapatla Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.district_coordinator_of_hospital_service: SSC/10th or equivalent, Lab Attendant Course or Intermediate (Lab Attendant Vocational Course) for Lab Attendant

content_sections.heading: DCHS Bapatla Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DCHS Bapatla Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DCHS Bapatla Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Theatre Assistant: Must have passed SSC/10th or its equivalent. Lab Attendant: Must have passed SSC/10th or its equivalent. Must Possess Lab Attendant Course or Intermediate (Lab Attendant Vocational Course) conducted by the Board of Inter Education, AP or from any other institution recognized by the Govt of A.P. General Duty Attendants GDA / MNO /FNO: Must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board. Post Mortem Assistant: Must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board. Office Sub-ordinate: Must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/BC/EWS: 5 years; Ex-service Men: 3 years in addition to length of service; Differently abled: 10 years

rows.event: Time Period for submission of Applications
Submission of grievances by the applicants if any on provisional merit list
Display of Final Merit List and Selection list
Conducting of Counselling & Issue of appointment orders to the selected candidates

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: 75% marks in qualifying examination Weightage up to 10 marks for experience Weightage up to 15% for contract/outsourcing service Counselling

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://bapatla.ap.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 01-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCHS Bapatla recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DCHS Bapatla Paramedical and Supporting Staff recruitment is 01-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Paramedical and Supporting Staff?
faq.answer: There are a total of 26 vacancies available for Paramedical and Supporting Staff posts in DCHS Bapatla.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years and the maximum age limit is 42 years for all posts.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 15000 Per Month.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for the Lab Attendant post?
faq.answer: For the Lab Attendant post, candidates must have passed SSC/10th or equivalent and possess a Lab Attendant Course or Intermediate (Lab Attendant Vocational Course).

faq.question: Q7. Are there any application fees for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, SC/ST candidates are required to pay an application fee of Rs. 250. PwBD candidates are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for DCHS Bapatla recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes marks in the qualifying examination, weightage for experience, weightage for contract/outsourcing service, and counselling.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website for DCHS Bapatla?
faq.answer: The official website for DCHS Bapatla is https://bapatla.ap.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 01/2026.
